sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109942" key="u(yibo/as" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑψῐ-βόας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n109942.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loud-shouter,</tr_> name of a frog in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:202" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">202</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
